response.original_title: 1-864.336.8850 What happens if my Uphold account is compromised?
response.overview: If you need assistance with your account, ☎️ ️ +1-864.336.8850 transactions, or wallet-related issues, customer support is available through official support channels. Visit the help center ☎️ ️+1-864.336.8850, start a live chat if available, or submit a support ticket with details about your issue. For faster assistance, have your account information and relevant transaction details ready. Always use the official support ☎️ ️ +1-864.336.8850 website to avoid scams and protect your account security.  How to Recover Your Uphold Account If you can’t log in to your Uphold account, you can recover it by resetting your password, restoring 2FA, or contacting Uphold support for identity verification. 1. Reset your password support.uphold.com •	Go to the Uphold login page and click “Forgot your password?”. •	Enter the email linked to your account and check your inbox (and Spam folder) for the “Reset your password” email.
